rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with high attendance expected. The event is anticipated to be one of the largest of the year, featuring a notable line-up.
changes_summary: Replaced 'huge' with 'new' and removed 'amazing' to maintain formal tone.
Changed 'Lots of people are expected' to 'high attendance expected' for attribution.
Removed 'You won't believe how cool the line-up is' and replaced with 'featuring a notable line-up'.
Added 'has announced' to attribute the launch to Qatar.
removed_phrases: You won't believe how cool the line-up is

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living has announced the launch of its new online shopping platform. The platform aims to enhance the shopping experience for consumers across the country.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'mind-blowing', 'must-see')
Replaced first-person with entity-first sentence ('Qatar Living has announced')
Toned down claims to factual statements

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo, marking a significant expansion of its global network. The airline reaffirmed its commitment to connecting passengers to key destinations worldwide.
changes_summary: Removed casual language and personal opinion
Attributed the announcement to Qatar Airways
